name: srm-generate-invoice
goal: Generate an SAP estimated invoice from a reviewed SRM settlement document through an approval-gated change-flow Recording Pack.
expectedResult: Generated SAP estimated invoice evidence is captured with invoice number or generation success message after explicit human approval.

params.name: settlement_number
params.description: Confirmed SRM settlement document number used to generate the SAP estimated invoice.

params.name: invoice_date
params.description: Invoice date in business-approved format, for example YYYY.MM.DD.

params.name: posting_date
params.description: Posting date in business-approved format, for example YYYY.MM.DD.

params.name: base_date
params.description: Baseline date in business-approved format, for example YYYY.MM.DD.
